diagrams.title: Benefits vs Limitations Balance
diagrams.description: A balanced scale diagram showing Cloud Computing benefits on one side and limitations on the other, illustrating that while benefits are significant, limitations should be carefully considered.
elements: Benefits labels: Cost Savings, Scalability, Accessibility, Automatic Updates
Limitations labels: Security Risks, Internet Dependency, Limited Control, Hidden Costs
diagrams.purpose: To visualize the trade-offs in cloud computing adoption and help decision-makers understand both advantages and challenges

diagrams.title: Key Benefits of Cloud Computing
diagrams.description: A visual mind-map or radial diagram with cloud computing at the center, branching out to show the primary benefits organizations gain.
elements: 6 benefit branches: Pay-as-you-go Pricing, Elastic Scalability, Global Access, High Availability, Automatic Backups, Reduced Maintenance
Color coding for positive visual hierarchy
diagrams.purpose: To clearly present the main advantages of cloud computing in a memorable visual format

diagrams.title: Cloud Computing Limitations & Challenges
diagrams.description: A warning-sign style diagram highlighting the key limitations and challenges that organizations may face when adopting cloud computing solutions.
elements: 6 limitation branches: Data Security Concerns, Downtime Risks, Vendor Lock-in, Performance Latency, Compliance Challenges, Limited Customization
Alert or caution icons for emphasis
Color coding using warmer tones to indicate caution
diagrams.purpose: To educate stakeholders about potential pitfalls and encourage proactive planning when migrating to cloud services
